title: Designing Journey
creator: Jenova Chen
description: Journey's creative director explains the game's original idea, emotional structure, anonymous multiplayer, iteration, and production difficulties.
useful: A clear example of tracing an artistic intention through concrete design and production choices.
audience: Designers and small teams trying to connect mechanics, emotion, and production decisions.
learning: Shape an experience around an emotional arc
Design anonymous cooperation without conventional communication
Protect a creative goal through iteration and production problems
